[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110010 4
1 0001001 2
2 0000000 a
3 1001110 4
4 0101111 5
5 1101011 5
6 0011001 3
7 1010001 3

01 10 1101111 6
12 21 1101111 6
23 32 1111011 6
34 43 1011001 4
45 54 1010001 3 match 7
56 65 1110011 5
67 76 1111011 6
70 07 1001111 5

13 31 0111111 6
24 42 1111011 6
35 53 0011001 3 match 6
46 64 1110011 5
57 75 0011001 3 match 6
60 06 1111110 6
71 17 0101111 5 match 4

03 30 1011111 6
14 41 1111111 a
25 52 1111011 6
36 63 1111011 6
47 74 1011001 4
50 05 1011111 6
61 16 1111111 a
72 27 1101011 5 match 5
